debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
pivot : α
l : List α
x : α
⊢ List.count x l = List.count x (smaller α inst✝ pivot l) + List.count x (larger α inst✝ pivot l)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by_cases hx : x ≤ pivot
  · have hx' : ¬ pivot < x := by exact not_lt_of_ge hx
    simpa [smaller, larger, List.count_filter, hx, hx']
  · have hx' : pivot < x := by exact lt_of_not_ge hx
    have hx'' : ¬ x ≤ pivot := by exact hx
    simpa [smaller, larger, List.count_filter, hx'', hx']
